chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.S-120 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-411/2025 2. For orders on office objections 3. For orders on MA-412/2025 4. For hearing of main case. 26.04.2025. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Jiskani, advocate for petitioners. = 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just excpetions. 4. It is contended by the learned counsel for the petitioners that the petitioner No.1 contracted freewill marriage with petitioner No.2 of her own accord against the wishes of her parents therefore, they being annoyed with such marriage causing harassment to the petitioners at the behest of official respondents and both of the petitioners now are apprehending danger to their lives. By contending so, he sought for protection for the petitioners. Let the notice be issued to the respondents and learned Additional Advocate General Sindh for 14.04.2025. In the meanwhile, SHO concerned is directed to extend due protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa
